vocab.meaning: có năng khiếu trồng cây/mát tay chăm sóc cây cối
vocab.example: To be honest, I don't exactly possess a green thumb, as I’ve accidentally killed a few succulents in the past.

vocab.meaning: những hoạt động liên quan đến làm vườn/trồng trọt
vocab.example: During the lockdown, I decided to take up some horticultural pursuits to keep myself occupied and relax.
I keep a snake plant in my bedroom because it’s well-known for its ability to purify the air and improve sleep quality.

vocab.meaning: những loại cây dễ chăm sóc (ít tốn công)
vocab.example: As a busy student, I generally opt for low-maintenance plants like cacti that don't require frequent watering.

vocab.meaning: sức hút về mặt thẩm mỹ
vocab.example: Indoor plants significantly enhance the aesthetic appeal of my living space, making it feel much more inviting.

vocab.meaning: một sở thích mang tính trị liệu/thư giãn
vocab.example: Nurturing a small sapling from a seed has become a therapeutic hobby that helps me de-stress after work.

vocab.meaning: tán lá xanh tươi trong nhà
vocab.example: I’ve turned my balcony into a small sanctuary filled with lush indoor foliage to escape the urban heat.

vocab.meaning: kiến thức về thực vật học
vocab.example: By having a few plants, I've managed to expand my botanical knowledge regarding soil pH and sunlight requirements.

vocab.meaning: mọc ra những chiếc lá mới
vocab.example: It’s incredibly rewarding to see my Monstera finally sprout new leaves after months of careful tending.

vocab.meaning: thổi bùng sức sống vào (không gian)
vocab.example: A couple of potted plants can really breathe life into a dull and sterile office environment.
